shows.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup
shows.description: Colombia vs. Portugal in a Group K finale in Miami, Fla. An energetic atmosphere awaits two squads coming off shutout wins on Matchday 2, with Colombia (6 pts., +3 goal diff.) having clinched their third knockout round in their last three World Cups, while Cristiano Ronaldo and Portugal (4 pts., +5 goal diff.) are also on very solid ground. Daniel Munoz opened Colombia's scoring in both games.

shows.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
shows.description: Two high-school students have secret alter egos as superheroes who save Paris from evil.
